description: Medical text. Dating: post-10th century, based on the physicians cited within the document. Contains descriptions of the health benefits and medical uses of different fruits--such as peaches, pomegranates, tamarind, and apples--in the tradition of Greek and Islamic medical philosophy. The text cites both Hippocrates (c. 460 - c. 377 BCE) and Ibn Riḍwān (998–1068 CE). Advice is given within the framework of bodily humors and comestible qualities. (Information from Avetisyan)
tags: Ibn Ridwan, food, fruit, medical, hippocrates, recipes
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
